functions.name: addMcpInspector
functions.description: Adds a MCP Inspector container resource
functions.remarks:
By default, the MCP Inspector uses npm/npx. To use a different package manager, chain the appropriate method:
```
builder.AddMcpInspector("inspector")
.WithYarn();
```
functions.returns: A reference to the `IResourceBuilder`1` for further configuration.
functions.signature: addMcpInspector(name: string, clientPort?: number, serverPort?: number, inspectorVersion?: string, proxyToken?: ParameterResource): McpInspectorResource

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the MCP Inspector container resource.

parameters.name: clientPort
parameters.description: The port for the client application. Defaults to 6274.

parameters.name: serverPort
parameters.description: The port for the server proxy application. Defaults to 6277.

parameters.name: inspectorVersion
parameters.description: The version of the Inspector app to use. Defaults to `InspectorVersion`.

parameters.name: proxyToken
parameters.description: The parameter used to provide the proxy authentication token. If `null` a random token will be generated.

functions.name: withBun
functions.description: Configures the MCP Inspector to use bun as the package manager.

functions.name: withInspectedMcpServer
functions.description: Configures the MCP Inspector resource to use a specified MCP server resource that uses SSE as the transport type.
functions.returns: A reference to the `IResourceBuilder`1` for further configuration.
functions.signature: withInspectedMcpServer(mcpServer: IResourceWithEndpoints, isDefault?: boolean, transportType?: McpTransportType, path?: string): McpInspectorResource

parameters.name: mcpServer
parameters.description: The `IResourceBuilder`1` for the MCP server resource.

parameters.name: isDefault
parameters.description: Indicates whether this MCP server should be considered the default server for the MCP Inspector.

parameters.name: transportType
parameters.description: The transport type to use for the MCP server. Defaults to `StreamableHttp`.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The path to use for MCP communication. Defaults to "/mcp".

functions.name: withPnpm
functions.description: Configures the MCP Inspector to use pnpm as the package manager.

functions.name: withYarn
functions.description: Configures the MCP Inspector to use yarn as the package manager.

enumTypes.name: McpTransportType
enumTypes.description: Represents the type of transport used by the MCP server.

memberDocs.name: StreamableHttp
memberDocs.description: The MCP server uses SSE (Server-Sent Events) as the transport type.

memberDocs.name: Sse
memberDocs.description: The MCP server uses Server Sent Events (SSE) as the transport type.
